MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Rita Howell.
Lorna Walker, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dorfin Distribution, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Euro Wrap Ltd. as follows:
Damages $36,528.07
Prejudgment Interest $5,103.92
Attorney fees $1,000.00
Costs $420.00 for a total of $43,051.99.
Judgment signed in open court.
